message.content: (1) No 3D content visible—flat mobile layout. (2) Text/UI: "Hello! I'm", "REDOYANUL HAQUE", "ENGINEER", "FULL-STACK DEVELOPER", top-right nav ("ABOUT", "WORK", "CONTACT"), bottom-right "RESUME" icon. (3) No hamburger menu (uses vertical nav). (4) Adapted for mobile (simplified, vertical layout) vs. desktop 3D experience. (5) Visual quality: clean, high-contrast, professional (flat design, no 3D elements).
